# Regex fixtures for skill: implementation-drift-check
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH line is verbatim-borrowed from agent-team-review MATCH fixture.

MATCH: check if we've drifted from the original spec since the last review
MATCH: reflect on our assumptions and flag any gaps in the implementation
MATCH: are we still on plan or have we deviated from the design document

NO_MATCH: team review before merge
